negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday cost efficient drift continuation rank over drift efficiency, range moderation, spread relief, volume stability, pullback containment, close commitment, session VWAP alignment, prior-session tailwind, adverse wick control, session phase maturity, continuation room, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0111 R0001 shows the tested cost efficient drift continuation surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0111 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0112 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 2 profitable and 7 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -31.72, and worst fold rw_004 net PnL -9.68.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution differed from closed-bar logic by 7.21 total net PnL across 7 better and 2 worse folds; closeout remains bounded to fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0111 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or cost-efficient-drift-continuation feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday cost efficient drift continuation rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0111 R0001 tests whether quiet, cost-efficient intraday drift with controlled pullbacks, clean spread relief, stable participation, close commitment, VWAP alignment, prior-session tailwind, adverse-wick control, and remaining continuation room can form a target-first continuation surface after realistic FPMarkets US100 spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0110 extreme retest failure reversal and C0109 failed VWAP reversion continuation. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0110 extreme-retest thresholds, retest windows, reversal wick gates, stops, targets, sessions, spread caps, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.

surface_distance_rationale.feature: Drift efficiency, range moderation, spread relief, volume stability, pullback containment, close commitment, session VWAP alignment, prior-session tailwind, adverse wick control, and continuation room replace C0110 extreme retest failure reversal features.
surface_distance_rationale.label: Target-first quality after cost-efficient drift continuation, not reversal after failed extreme retest.
surface_distance_rationale.model: Fold-local linear cost-efficient drift continuation rank.
surface_distance_rationale.trade_logic: Continuation-direction top fold-local cost-efficient-drift-continuation scores per active day.

pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: New major campaign surface asks whether low-noise, cost-efficient directional drift continuation can survive paired MT5 validation.

feature.summary: drift efficiency; range moderation; spread relief; volume stability; pullback containment; close commitment; session VWAP alignment; prior-session tailwind; adverse wick control; session phase maturity; continuation room; spread stress inverse.

label.summary: Target-first quality after cost efficient drift continuation.

model.summary: Fold-local linear intraday cost efficient drift continuation rank.

trade_logic.summary: Continuation-direction top fold-local cost-efficient-drift-continuation scores per active day using next-bar-open fixed-lot discovery entries.
